query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_monster_catalog) as monsters,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_item_catalog) as items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_equipment_catalog) as equipment,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_skill_catalog) as skills;
